name: Membersown
description_short: MembersOwn Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, certificates, home equity lines of credit, and value-added member services.
description_long: MembersOwn Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative providing traditional banking and credit union services. Based on their website content, the organization is headquartered in Lincoln, Nebraska, and serves a community of members through both physical branches and digital banking channels. The credit union emphasizes member benefits and personalized financial solutions aligned with member needs rather than shareholder profits. MembersOwn offers a comprehensive range of banking products including deposit accounts, certificates of deposit, home equity lines of credit, and various lending options. Their current promotional offerings include a 12-month Share Certificate Special at 3.75% APY and home equity line of credit applications. The institution provides digital banking capabilities through their MembersOwn Mobile Banking platform, which includes features like push notifications and SavvyMoney credit score access. MembersOwn distinguishes itself through community-focused initiatives such as their Gift It Forward program, which allows members to earn $500 for themselves and donate $500 to local nonprofits of their choice. The credit union also partners with established financial service providers like TurboTax and H&R Block to offer members discounts and convenience. Their membership includes access to shared branching and ATM networks, free notary services, and various financial guidance resources. As a credit union, MembersOwn operates under the cooperative model where members are technically owners with voting rights and the ability to participate in annual meetings. The organization emphasizes personalization and member relationships through their tagline "where it's all about you," suggesting a focus on individual member needs rather than mass-market approaches. Limited information is available on their website regarding comprehensive product details, specific loan terms, interest rates for most products, minimum deposit requirements, membership eligibility criteria, or detailed fee structures beyond promotional offerings.
services: Share Certificates (CDs) with current 12-month special at 3.75% APY
SavvyMoney credit score monitoring and tracking
Shared branching and ATM network access
TurboTax discount partnerships (20% off federal products)
Harland Clarke check and check-related products
TreasuryDirect U.S. Treasury bond and investment access
MembersOwn Mobile Banking with push notifications
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure means profits theoretically benefit members rather than external shareholders
Free notary service for members available in drive-thru and lobby
Access to SavvyMoney credit score monitoring through online and mobile banking
No-cost TruStage Accidental Death & Dismemberment insurance included for members
Partnership discounts with TurboTax (20% off federal products) and H&R Block for tax filing
Shared branch and ATM network access extending service locations beyond physical branches
Community-focused Gift It Forward program rewarding members for charitable engagement
Push notifications available through mobile banking for account monitoring
cons: Limited transparency on website regarding loan rates, fees, and product terms for most offerings
No clear information about membership eligibility requirements or how to join
Geographic limitations likely apply as a regional credit union (Nebraska-based with no multi-state branch information visible)
Minimal details on APY rates for savings accounts, checking accounts, or most certificate products except promotional 3.75% 12-month special
No apparent online account opening process or application details described on website
best_for: Nebraska residents seeking member-owned banking with community reinvestment values
Homeowners interested in home equity lines of credit with flexible access to home equity
Credit union members prioritizing free ancillary services like notarization and financial guidance
Consumers seeking tax season savings through partner discount programs
diagnosis: MembersOwn Credit Union is best for Nebraska-based consumers who value the credit union cooperative model and seek traditional banking services with community reinvestment principles. Primary caveat: the website lacks essential transparency regarding rates, fees, loan terms, and membership eligibility, requiring direct contact with the institution for specific product details and qualification information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: MembersOwn Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, and certificates.
